intro: We start with a simple premise.
caption: I tied helium balloons to his legs until he floated up into outer space and ran out of oxygen.
hidden_touch: smiley sun

intro: In celebration of a loving holiday we have death by chocolate.
caption: I gifted him poisoned Valentine's day treats.
hidden_touch: Happy Valentine's Day text, heart on chocolate box

intro: Today, Spidey meets his death a la LOTR via fiery lava.
caption: I flung him into an active volcano.
hidden_touch: debris flying, motion lines on spider

intro: Little guy was just trying to get cleaned, but was shocked with the result.
caption: I threw a toaster into the tub while he bathed.
hidden_touch: framed 'Home is where the heart is' spider web art, rubber duck, checkered floor

intro: We find Spidey craving dinner and as he prepped, things got pretty heated.
caption: I stuck him into a hot oven.
hidden_touch: painting of happy spider on wall, spider on serving plate on counter

intro: Spidey was doing his best to demonstrate his national pride this President's day, unfortunately he got in a bit over his head.
caption: I drowned him in the reflecting pool in front of the Washington Monument.
hidden_touch: spider wearing tiny Uncle Sam hat, spray-paint trees/clouds

intro: It wasn't all sun and fun for Spidey on this exotic getaway.
caption: I abandoned him on an island and left him to shrivel up and starve.
hidden_touch: smiley sun, seagulls, tiny drink with straw on island

intro: Apparently our buddy just wasn't meant for the cold, he is regretting passing on that 8 armed parka.
caption: I stuck him in the freezer and froze him in an ice cube.
hidden_touch: ice cream tub, steak, bag of frozen veggies, 'More Veggies' bag

intro: This time I took a bit more of an intricate path and let's just say they were pretty magical beans I bought.
caption: I planted bean seeds in his head and watered them until they sprouted a giant bean stalk from the top of his head. He would later die from complications due to a giant beanstalk growing form the top of his head.
hashtags: #magic beans #water beans #top of head #giant beanstalk #complications #spider death
hidden_touch: tree with hole, flowers, speckled grass

intro: Spidey was just trying to freshen up a bit, but things really took a TURN for the worse.
caption: I put him in the dryer on high heat and ran a full cycle.
hidden_touch: a sock with a smiley face visible through the dryer window, a hand-lettered sign on the wall that says 'NO SPIDERS'

intro: Spidey was hoping to get somewhere in life, but unfortunately he was BOXED IN from the start.
caption: I packed him into a small cardboard box with no air holes and mailed him to the wrong address.
hidden_touch: the shipping label reads 'NOWHERE, NV', a tiny postal worker waves cheerfully from behind the counter

intro: Spidey always wanted to be a BIG SHOT — well, careful what you wish for.
caption: I loaded him into a cannon and fired him into the far wall of the tent.
hidden_touch: a tiny crowd of stick figure spectators with O-shaped mouths, a banner above the cannon that reads 'THE AMAZING SPIDEY'

intro: Spidey was a little nervous about his appointment, but the dentist assured him he'd have a GAS.
caption: I put him under with laughing gas at the dentist and never turned it off.
hidden_touch: a framed poster of a smiling tooth on the wall, the spider is wearing a tiny paper bib that says 'PATIENT'

intro: Spidey wandered onto the job site looking for work, but things got pretty CONCRETE pretty fast.
caption: I tipped him into a running cement mixer and poured him into a sidewalk.
hidden_touch: a tiny hardhat sitting beside the mixer, a freshly poured sidewalk square with eight small leg-prints visible in the wet cement

intro: Spidey stepped right up to the carnival this summer, eager to prove himself — turns out he really DIDN'T HAVE WHAT IT TAKES to handle the pressure.
caption: I placed him on the base of the high striker and brought the mallet down until the bell rang and he was flat.
hidden_touch: The bell at the top of the tower has a tiny smiley face drawn on it, and a prize ribbon hanging nearby is labeled '1st Place'

intro: Our little scholar was hitting the books hard this back-to-school season — a real VOLUME of bad decisions led him here.
caption: I stacked the entire World Book Encyclopedia collection on top of him, A through Z, while he read.
hidden_touch: The last visible book spine reads 'Vol. 26: Z' and a tiny library card on the floor nearby is stamped 'OVERDUE'

intro: Spidey had always dreamed of reaching for the stars, and honestly his ambitions were truly OUT OF THIS WORLD — right up until they weren't.
caption: I strapped him to the nose of the shuttle and launched it so that he burned up on reentry over the Pacific Ocean.
hidden_touch: A tiny American flag planted near the launchpad and a handwritten countdown chalkboard in the background reading 'T-0'

intro: Spidey wandered onto the lanes looking for a good time, but this turned out to be a classic case of being in the WRONG PLACE at the RIGHT TIME for a STRIKE.
caption: I rolled a sixteen-pound ball down lane seven and it hit him straight on while he stood there admiring the pins.
hidden_touch: The scoreboard above the lane shows a perfect score of 300 with Spidey's name written as 'SPIDEY' in the slot, and a rental shoe rack in the corner has one tiny shoe labeled 'Size ½'

intro: Spidey decided to hit the slopes this winter, but things really went DOWNHILL from there.
caption: I nudged a small pile of snow at the top of the mountain while he adjusted his goggles at the bottom and waited for it to reach him.
hidden_touch: A tiny hot cocoa mug sitting on a lodge windowsill; a little flag at the top of the ski run labeled 'BUNNY SLOPE'

intro: Spidey was really looking forward to the show, but unfortunately the feature presentation LEFT A MARK on him.
caption: I shook the vintage projector loose from its mount in the booth above him while he sat in the front row eating popcorn.
hidden_touch: A tiny now-playing marquee outside reading 'CHARLOTTE'S WEB'; a half-eaten box of Junior Mints on the armrest beside Spidey

intro: Our buddy was just enjoying a stroll across the green, but he really got caught up in someone else's DRIVE.
caption: I teed up a golf ball directly on top of him and swung.
hidden_touch: A tiny golf cart parked near the flag with a little striped umbrella on it; a scorecard on the ground nearby with every hole marked as a zero

intro: Spidey was due for a little trim, but the whole visit turned into quite a HAIR-RAISING experience.
caption: I switched on the salon floor vacuum while he sat in the styling chair waiting for his appointment and let it find him.
hidden_touch: A wall-mounted poster of a spider with a very stylish blowout hairdo; a little tip jar on the counter labeled 'TIPS' with one coin in it

intro: Spidey was absolutely in AWE of the marine life on display, which is to say he really got a little TOO CLOSE to the exhibits.
caption: I dropped him into the large open-top tank while he leaned over the railing to get a better look at the fish inside.
hidden_touch: A gift shop sign in the background advertising 'SPIDER MAGNETS $4.99'; a small plaque on the tank that reads 'DO NOT TAP GLASS'

intro: Spidey had been feeling a little DIRTY lately and decided it was time to come CLEAN.
caption: I sent him through the car wash on the deluxe cycle and the big spinning brushes got to him before the rinse.
hidden_touch: A little air freshener shaped like a pine tree hanging from a nearby sign, and a smiley face drawn in the soap suds on the ground
scene_description: A bright blue car wash tunnel interior with thick pink and red rotating brushes mid-spin. Spidey is caught between two brushes, arms splayed, mouth in an 'O' of surprise. Soap foam spray-painted in white blobs around the floor and ceiling. Flat yellow walls, a green 'DELUXE WASH' sign overhead. A pine tree air freshener dangles from the sign. Smiley face doodled into the soap on the floor near Spidey's feet.
